SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ELENA JACKSON, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFED SPANISH INTERPERTER, NINA SAFDI, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADA DISON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
